<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# scripts/export_pydantic_schemas.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:00:07Z

## Purpose
Export Pydantic JSON schemas from agentic routers · Iter 44 · Tier-1 #5.

Walks every Pydantic BaseModel in the agentic routers, emits:
  · backend/contracts/<module>.schema.json   (JSON schema per model)
  · backend/contracts/MANIFEST.json          (index)
  · frontend/src/schemas/agentic.contracts.js  (Zod schemas matching same fields)

Operator runs this whenever a Pydantic model changes · CI verifies frontend
schemas stay in sync.

## Imports
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import sys
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `_` import importlib
- from `_` import inspect
- from `pydantic` import BaseModel

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `discover_models()`: Return {model_name: {fields: {name: {type, required, default}}}}.
- `py_type_to_js_zod(py_type)`: Map Pydantic type string → Zod expression.
- `_atom(base)`: (no docstring)
- `write_contracts(models)`: (no docstring)
- `write_zod_schemas(models)`: (no docstring)
- `main()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above

- Strip Optional wrapper
- Per-model JSON schema
